title: Fix plugin packaging

tasks.title: Add bundled plugin package contract
tasks.verification: RED: `bun test test/package-contract.test.ts` failed because package main was `src/plugin.ts`, types/exports/build/prepack were missing. GREEN: package metadata now points to bundled dist entry with types/exports; `bun test test/package-contract.test.ts` passes (3 pass); `bun run build` emits dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts; `bun run typecheck` passes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added tsup-based bundle configuration, changed plugin package runtime metadata to dist/index.js/dist/index.d.ts with exports for `.` and `./server`, moved OpenCode packages to devDependencies, added package lifecycle scripts and package contract tests, and updated bun.lock. Verified package contract test, build, and typecheck.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial RED package contract test failed because package main was src/plugin.ts and types/exports/build/prepack were missing.

attempts.error: Package contract absent: main=src/plugin.ts, no types/exports/build/prepack.
attempts.diagnosis: Expected pre-fix RED; package metadata did not satisfy AC1/AC2/AC5.
attempts.fix_tried: Added tsup config, dist package metadata, scripts, files contract, and lockfile update.

tasks.title: Fix OpenCode event hook boundary and guards
tasks.verification: RED: `bun test test/plugin.test.ts` failed because canonical `{ event }` payload did not dispatch (`session.prompt` calls expected 1, received 0). GREEN: added narrow OpenCode event hook boundary normalizer for `{ event }` plus undefined no-op, removed speculative runtime comment, and `bun test test/plugin.test.ts` passes (16 pass); `bun run typecheck` passes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added wrapper-path test for default plugin event hook using canonical OpenCode `{ event }` payload, implemented narrow boundary normalization for event hooks, retained undefined no-op behavior, removed speculative loader workaround narrative from runtime source, and verified plugin tests/typecheck.
tasks.notes: Completed OpenCode event hook boundary and guard task.

error_recovery.last_error: RED test showed wrapped `{ event }` payload did not dispatch; session.prompt remained at 0.

attempts.error: Canonical OpenCode event wrapper was passed directly to handleEvent, so event.type was undefined and handler no-oped.
attempts.diagnosis: Default plugin event hook needed to unwrap `{ event }` before calling raw-event handler.
attempts.fix_tried: Added normalizeEventInput for undefined and wrapped event payloads and updated hook boundary.

tasks.title: Wire Makefile build-plugin to typecheck and bundle
tasks.verification: RED: extended `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh` failed because `make build-plugin` ran typecheck only and did not run `bun run build`. GREEN: `make build-plugin` now runs frozen install, typecheck, and build; Makefile contract script passes; `make build-plugin` succeeds and emits dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended Makefile contract test to require `make build-plugin` to run both typecheck and bundle build, then updated `build-plugin` target to run `bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run typecheck && bun run build`. Verified contract script and full `make build-plugin`.

error_recovery.last_error: RED contract script failed because build-plugin did not run `bun run build`.

attempts.error: `make build-plugin` dry-run lacked plugin bundle build command.
attempts.diagnosis: Build target satisfied old typecheck-only behavior, not AC3 bundle-generation requirement.
attempts.fix_tried: Added build requirement to contract test and updated Makefile build-plugin target.

tasks.title: Harden deploy-local around bundled runtime artifact
tasks.verification: RED: extended Makefile contract script failed because deploy-local did not verify dist/index.js. GREEN: deploy-local verifies dist/index.js/dist/index.d.ts and package metadata, deploys package-shaped runtime instead of raw source tree, missing-bundle dry-run fails, normal dry-run verifies bundle successfully, and contract script passes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added deploy-local runtime bundle verification for dist JS/types and package metadata, changed deploy to write a package-shaped runtime tree (`package.json`, `dist/`, optional NOTICE) instead of rsyncing raw source, improved dry-run messaging, and extended Makefile contract tests. Verified missing-bundle failure and successful dry-run verification.

error_recovery.last_error: RED contract script failed because deploy-local did not verify dist/index.js and still rsynced raw source tree.

attempts.error: Deploy script lacked bundled runtime verification and copied source tree wholesale.
attempts.diagnosis: Deploy path could still install a raw or missing runtime entry, violating AC4/AC5.
attempts.fix_tried: Added bundle/package metadata verification and package-shaped deploy copy.

tasks.title: Update README with fixed plugin build/deploy path
tasks.verification: Docs-only task. Updated README plugin section and Make target table to describe build-plugin as install+typecheck+build, deploy-local as package-shaped bundled runtime deploy, and restart requirement. Verified no workaround wording in README and Makefile contract checks still pass.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated README plugin documentation to describe bundled dist runtime, package-shaped deploy, `make build-plugin` build behavior, and OpenCode restart requirement. Avoided workaround-focused docs. Verified contract script and README search for workaround language.
tasks.notes: Completed README fixed build/deploy path update.

tasks.title: Run final packaging compatibility verification
tasks.verification: Harden remediation: added structural hook payload normalizers/tests, guarded TTFT callback rejection, checked rsync availability before deploy, and clarified README deploy docs. Verification passed: bun test (91 pass), bun run typecheck, bun run build, ./scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh, ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run, make lint, make test, make build-plugin. Targeted re-verification marked all applied harden fixes resolved.

wisdom.content: For OpenCode plugin package fixes, make package metadata a tested contract: assert `main`, `types`, `exports['.']`, `exports['./server']`, and lifecycle scripts in Bun tests before changing package.json. This gives clean RED/GREEN evidence for packaging-only changes.

Final packaging verification should include both positive and negative deploy paths: build/test/typecheck plus `deploy-local --dry-run` success and a temporary missing-bundle failure check. This proves deploy refuses broken runtime artifacts without mutating the real local-share plugin.

Release hardening for plugin host boundaries should convert `unknown` hook payloads to typed handlers through small runtime validators, not direct casts. Keep malformed payloads as no-op compatibility inputs and add tests that exercise the default plugin hook wrapper, not only internal handlers.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal with explicit reply: approve

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings persisted. Agreement approved via user reply: approve. Contract minted with AC1-AC10, C1-C6, DONT1-DONT8.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted. Architecture: tsup-built ESM dist/index.js, package main/types/exports to dist, package-shaped deploy, narrow event wrapper normalization, structural package verification. Independent validator verdict VALIDATED; caution refinements integrated (narrow normalizer, tsup maintenance note, optional package validators).

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan via explicit reply: approve. Task graph has 6 tasks with contract refs covering AC1-AC10; strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning.

execution.approval_evidence: All 6 planned tasks completed. Verification passed: bun test (88 pass), bun run typecheck, bun run build, scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh, make build-plugin, deploy-local dry-run, missing-bundle failure check, make test, make lint. Strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User invoked adv-harden workflow after acceptance prompt. Acceptance review verdict APPROVED; issue fixed (@types/bun pinned to 1.3.14); verification passed: bun test, bun run typecheck, ./scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh. Executive summary persisted. Contract review matrix has 24/24 passed/respected rows with 0 failing rows.

items.text: `plugin/package.json` loads runtime from bundled JS (`dist/index.js`), not `src/plugin.ts`.
Package metadata includes `types` and `exports["."]` / `exports["./server"]` with `./dist/index.js` paths.
`make build-plugin` generates bundle + declarations and fails on typecheck/build errors.
`scripts/deploy-local.sh` refuses missing bundle and deploys valid bundled runtime shape.
Package lifecycle supports local deploy and packed/git-installed usage; no runtime `node_modules` dependency if bundled.
Defensive hook guards keep undefined `chat.message` and `event` probe inputs as no-op.
If design confirms OpenCode event wrapper mismatch, handler supports canonical `{ event }` shape in this change.
Tests cover hook guards, event wrapper behavior if included, package metadata/build invariant, and deploy missing-bundle failure.
Verification passes: plugin tests, typecheck, relevant Make/deploy checks.
README documents LBP fixed build/deploy/restart path; no workaround-focused section.
Preserve existing fallback routing behavior except for compatibility no-op guards and confirmed event wrapper compatibility.
Keep OpenCode 1.15.9 compatibility as primary target.
Use public OpenCode plugin/package surfaces; do not patch OpenCode core.
Keep `agent.<name>.options.fallback_models` schema unchanged.
Prefer structural packaging/build guarantees over workaround instructions or load-failure masking.
Keep verification local and repeatable where possible.
Do not leave OpenCode loading this plugin through `src/plugin.ts` in runtime package metadata.
Do not require runtime `node_modules/` in the local deployed plugin if dependencies are bundled.
Do not silently deploy a package whose `main` points to a missing file.
Do not mask plugin startup errors by letting plugin load fail as workaround.
Do not expand into OpenCode upstream changes inside this repo.
Do not rewrite fallback orchestration, cooldown behavior, TTFT behavior, model resolution semantics, or user-facing schema.
Do not add workaround-focused README sections; document the fixed path instead.
Do not add `session.deleted` / `session.compacted` lifecycle hygiene handlers in this change; carry as follow-up if still valuable.

rows.evidence: plugin/package.json main is ./dist/index.js; package-contract test asserts not src/ or .ts; deploy verifies dist/index.js.
rows.notes: Runtime entry no longer points at src/plugin.ts.

rows.evidence: plugin/package.json types plus exports . and ./server point to ./dist/index.d.ts and ./dist/index.js; package-contract test covers these paths.
Makefile build-plugin runs bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run typecheck, bun run build; ./scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh passed.
rows.notes: Build fails on typecheck or bundle failure by command chaining.

rows.evidence: scripts/deploy-local.sh verify_runtime_bundle checks dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts before deploy; final verification included deploy dry-run success and missing-bundle dry-run failure.
rows.notes: Deploy copies package.json, optional NOTICE, and dist only.

rows.evidence: plugin/package.json has prepack build script, no runtime dependencies field, package files dist/NOTICE; deploy output is package-shaped runtime without node_modules.
rows.notes: Dev dependencies are not required by deployed bundled runtime.

rows.evidence: plugin tests cover undefined chat.message input/output and undefined event input/hook payload as no-op; bun test passed 88 tests.
plugin/src/plugin.ts normalizes canonical { event } payload before handleEvent; plugin test verifies wrapped session.error dispatch triggers fallback; bun test passed.
rows.notes: Design confirmed wrapper mismatch and implementation supports it.

rows.evidence: plugin tests cover hook guards and event wrapper; package-contract test covers package metadata/build scripts; Makefile contract script covers deploy missing-bundle verification surface.
rows.notes: Deploy missing-bundle behavior also manually verified in final task.

rows.evidence: Verification passed: bun test (88 pass), bun run typecheck, bun run build, ./scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh, make build-plugin, deploy-local dry-run, missing-bundle failure, make test, make lint. After acceptance remediation: bun test, typecheck, test-makefile-targets passed.
README plugin section documents make build-plugin, make deploy-local, bundled package-shaped runtime, and OpenCode restart; search found no workaround-focused wording.
rows.notes: Docs describe fixed path, not workaround.

rows.evidence: Review found fallback behavior unchanged except hook boundary guards/event wrapper normalization; no fallback schema/orchestration rewrite.
OpenCode 1.15.9 compatibility addressed by bundled ESM entry and canonical { event } wrapper support; tests lock probe no-op behavior.
All changes confined to this repo; no OpenCode core patch or upstream modifications; cross-repo review passed.
agent.<name>.options.fallback_models schema unchanged; config loader/model routing semantics not rewritten.
Package metadata tests, Makefile contract tests, deploy bundle validation, and package-shaped deploy provide structural guarantees.
Local repeatable checks passed: bun test, typecheck, build, Make/deploy contract checks, make test, make lint.
plugin/package.json main is ./dist/index.js; deploy runtime entry is dist/index.js; package-contract test rejects src/.ts main.
rows.notes: Runtime package does not load src/plugin.ts.

rows.evidence: No runtime dependencies field; deploy copies dist/package metadata only, not node_modules.
rows.notes: Bundled runtime avoids runtime node_modules requirement.

rows.evidence: deploy-local verify_runtime_bundle refuses missing dist/index.js/dist/index.d.ts before deploy; missing-bundle dry-run failed as expected.
Implementation fixes packaging/hook boundary directly; README avoids workaround language and does not rely on plugin load failure.
Cross-repo review passed; no upstream OpenCode files or patches touched.
No rewrite to fallback orchestration, cooldown behavior, TTFT behavior, model resolution semantics, or schema; only package/hook compatibility changed.
README updated with fixed build/deploy/restart path; review found no workaround-focused section/wording.
No session.deleted/session.compacted lifecycle handlers added.
